target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is fully engulfed in flames with thick black smoke; structural integrity compromised; catastrophic damage consistent with K-kill

summary: One military equipment target is assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts a single military vehicle fully engulfed in flames and emitting thick black smoke while stationary on the side of a road, indicating catastrophic damage. The functional impact is likely complete loss of operational capability for the vehicle.
